news.title: Skins
news.body: Skins in the cheat will be temporarily unavailable.

news.title: v3.0.0 — Currently in Beta
news.body: New version of mozority released! Currently available only for Beta users.

news.title: v2.1.0 — New skins added
news.body: Added 15 new weapon skins from the latest CS2 case. Full sticker support is now available.

news.title: Server maintenance scheduled
news.body: Auth servers will be down on Feb 21, 03:00–05:00 UTC for maintenance. Injections during that window may fail.

news.title: Glove skins are here!
news.body: Glove skin changer is now supported. Select your gloves in the inventory tab.

news.title: How to report bugs
news.body: Use our Discord server #bug-reports channel. Include your loader version and a screenshot.

news.title: Welcome to mozority!
news.body: Thank you for choosing mozority skinchanger. Stay tuned for updates!
